title: gymnadenia densiflora
intro: Gymnadenia densiflora, also known as the dense-flowered gymnadenia or mountain lady's-tresses, is a type of orchid native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Gymnadenia densiflora is used to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones, bladder infections, and other urinary problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
